_comment: Central registry for projects using the literature pipeline. Two tiers: Tier 1 = full systematic-review workflow (discovery+fetch+extract+report). Tier 2 = library-only (just PDFs + sidecars + .ris). Add a project here when it starts using the puller. Promotion 2 → 1 is opt-in; never automatic.

_schema.lib_dir: PDF/sidecar/.ris directory, relative to project root
_schema.parent: Subprojects only: name of containing top-level project
_schema.active: false to skip in audits without removing from registry
